message:
test: Add E2E tests for cookie consent and analytics gating

- Add consent-banner.spec.ts with 13 tests for banner UI/UX
- Add consent-settings.spec.ts with 15 tests for settings dialog
- Add consent-helpers.ts with test utilities and locators
- Fix SSR bug in getPrivacySignals() - check window before navigator

Tests cover:
- First visit banner display
- Accept All / Reject All functionality
- Consent persistence across page reloads
- Consent version-based re-consent
- Settings dialog category toggles
- Analytics script gating (GA4 not loaded when rejected)
- Mobile viewport compatibility
- Keyboard accessibility

6 tests skipped for privacy signal injection (DNT/GPC)
as they require complex browser configuration.

Closes: jeffreysprompts.com-rij8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
